input.title: [Desktop Chrome] Can't expand children on hover during drag-and-drop
input.body:
## Steps to Reproduce

```
- a
- b
  - c
```

Drag `a` over `b`.

## Current Behavior

It is not possible to activate the `DropChild` of `b`.

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/84e4fe68-a879-473e-a510-10e2a79859ad

## Expected Behavior

`b` should expand when hovering in the correct place, as can be seen on mobile.

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/68beab14-154a-4c28-803b-fd57afe741d5
